allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; lines=sys.stdin.readlines\(\); msgs=[json.loads\(l\) for l in lines[-50:]]; [print\(m.get\(''''role'''',''''''''\),'''':'''',str\(m.get\(''''content'''',''''''''\)\)[:500]\) for m in msgs if m.get\(''''role''''\) in \(''''user'''',''''assistant''''\)]")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\);process.stdin.setEncoding\(''''utf8''''\);let d='''''''';process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\(''''Running:'''',j.running,''''| Season:'''',j.season,''''| Mode:'''',j.mode,''''| Progress entries:'''',Object.keys\(j.progress||{}\).length,''''| Log lines:'''',j.log?.length\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\);process.stdin.setEncoding\(''''utf8''''\);let d='''''''';process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);const now=Date.now\(\);console.log\(''''Next fetch in:'''',Math.round\(\(j.nextFetchAt-now\)/1000\)+''''s'''',''''| Fetch running:'''',j.fetchRunning,''''| Interval:'''',j.interval/1000+''''s''''\);}\);")
